context: Tests whether the agent implements proper error handling, validates URLs against the expected format, checks for authentication tokens, and examines exit codes properly.

checklist.name: Uses get_mr_comments.sh
checklist.description: Calls or integrates .agents/skills/gitlab-api/scripts/get_mr_comments.sh in the solution

checklist.name: Checks for GITLAB_TOKEN
checklist.description: Verifies that GITLAB_TOKEN or GITLAB_PAT environment variable exists before making requests

checklist.name: Validates URL format
checklist.description: Checks that URL matches pattern https://gitlab.com/*/merge_requests/[number] or validates against expected format

checklist.name: Handles 401 errors
checklist.description: Detects authentication failures and provides feedback about token issues

checklist.name: Handles 404 errors
checklist.description: Detects project not found errors and provides feedback about URL or access issues

checklist.name: Checks exit codes
checklist.description: Examines script exit code (0 for success, 1 for errors) to detect failures

checklist.name: Mentions read_api scope
checklist.description: References or checks that token has read_api scope as part of diagnostics

checklist.name: Validates response format
checklist.description: Checks that response contains expected fields like 'Author:' or 'Date:' to ensure valid output

checklist.name: Provides actionable suggestions
checklist.description: Includes suggestions for fixing detected problems (e.g., 'set GITLAB_TOKEN', 'verify URL format')
